Are you ready to turn heads? The sleek and stunning TL 2000 Sting S4 is a custom built to order aircraft. TL Aircraft has been building Aircraft since 1989. Let us build a new Sting S4 for you! You will find options for the aircraft in the listing. We are available and ready to assist you with any questions. Contact us now!

Attending EAA Oshkosh AirVenture 2023?
Stop by and see us at #306, #307, #318!

TL’s demo Sparker is now available for purchase! Utilized as a demo since 2022, this impressive aircraft features a three panel G3X touch screen layout.  It is equipped with a Garmin 507 auto pilot. Airframe & Engine total time: 330. This Aircraft has always been hangar kept. This aircraft can be flown with a sport pilot license.

Introducing the 2025 Sirius Sport TL-3000-916IS. Features include a Rotax 916IS 160HP engine, dual Garmin G3X screens, Garmin 750, Garmin 507 autopilot, Garmin G5, and 688 lbs useful load. Contact us to schedule a demo. The 2026 TL-3000 916IS can be ordered & registered as a mosaic Aircraft. Call for details on your specific build & pricing.

Price: $320K – 340K. The Sirius Backcountry Providing a Truly Remarkable STOL Aircraft.
For sale: 2025 Sirius Back Country Aircraft. This STOL Aircraft is custom-built to the specs below. Call for equipment and pricing details. Orders for 2025 models are now open. Our demo will be showcased at Oshkosh 2025.

The TL 3000 Sirius is a high-wing carbon composite aircraft from TL Sport Aircraft/Ultralight. This elegant aircraft with superb flight performance, clean lines, safety, and unmatched comfort in the cockpit stands alone in its reliability and ease of handling.  The Sirius offers a well-appointed cockpit with a generous heated cabin space for both pilot and passenger. It provides a glass panel with technology from Garmin.  You will enjoy the deluxe cushioned body-contoured heated seats with 3-point safety harnesses, ergonomically designed operating systems, dual yoke controls, electronic flaps and a large baggage compartment.  This aircraft has a one-year or 100-hour manufacturer’s warranty. Call us today!

The P92 Echo Super is the fully mature version of the aircraft that started the Tecnam LSA line. With its 100 hp engine (Rotax 912ULS), superior performance, dependable systems, sturdy structure, low maintenance costs and low cost of operation. With that said, the P92 Echo Super advantage becomes readily apparent in a flight school environment or for a private owner.
This Aircraft features Dual Dynon displays, ADSB out, and a Garmin GPS 660. Only two owners with the first 16 years having the aircraft hangared in Tucson, AZ’s dry climate. The Aircraft comes with complete logs and no known damage history. The conditional inspection was last completed in April of 2025.

Flightline Aviation are pleased to present this Tecnam P2010 for sale.
G-CMCG is a TDi model powered by a 170Hp Continental diesel engine, which offers incredibly low operating costs. It is also specified with fantastic factory options, in addition to the Garmin G1000 NXi avionics makes this a very capable and enjoyable aircraft to fly!
The P2010 is a very spacious 4-seater, with 3 cabin doors and a luggage compartment for great practicality on those longer trips. This example has been maintained fastidiously & is presented very well throughout, and is ready for its new owner.

This Immaculate low time 1979 Piper Dakota 236 has been hangar kept with the last owner for 32 years. The airframe only has 2035 hours since new and 291 hours on a Factory Remanufactured to new zero time limits engine plus an upgraded 3 blade Top Prop Scimitar Propeller. A new Gray metal instrument panel has been installed plus Garmin updated Avionics with IFR GNS 430W WAAS GPS coupled to S-TEC 30 Auto Pilot with GPSS and Garmin ADSB IN and OUT GTX 345 Transponder. The airplane has been based in California since new, has all of logbooks since new and all the original Piper documents that the airplane came with from new. The current owner kept all the maintenance work orders and receipts in chronological order since he purchased the airplane in 1993. This is one of the best Dakotas in existence and its ready to fly away.

An exceptional 1969 Piper Cherokee that features the perfect blend of traditional instruments and modern upgrades. The ideal flying environment was achieved by adding new digital instruments while keeping the essential analog ones. It's the perfect setup for initial or IFR training, a time builder or just for transportation. In 2023 an Electronics International CGR-30P/CGR-30C primary engine instrument combo was installed giving the pilot superior accuracy and dependability managing all engine perimeters including EI fuel sensors. Paired with a Garmin G5 digital multi-function display the plane was truly brought to the 21st century.
The engine was overhauled in 2022 and got all new Type "D" Teflon hoses and shock mounts during installation.
The aircraft has all logs since new, and all ADs are complied with.
The Cherokee 140/160 is known for its reliability and fuel economy.

1945 Grumman Bearcat F8F-2, Only 992 Hours Since Factory New. Owned By Well Known Warbird Collector “Mustang Mike” Since 1963. Complete Navy Log Books Since New. This Airplane Has Been Hangar Kept And Is In Immaculate Condition. The Civilian Paint Scheme Was Applied In 1965 And Still Shows Like The Day It Was Applied. Also Available Is A Large Inventory Of Spare Parts Collected Over Fifty Years Ago. The Grumman Bearcat was designed as a Fighter Interceptor during World War II serving in squadron VF-19 aboard the USS Langley and squadron VF-18 at North Island. The aircraft would launch from Navy Aircraft Carriers climb to ten thousand feet in sixty seconds and be able to shoot the enemy down instantly. If You Want The Best Bearcat In Existence You Just Found It.

This 2016 CubCrafters XCub, N889F, is a capable and well-balanced backcountry aircraft designed for practical, real-world use. It offers strong short-field performance, cruises notably faster than a traditional Cub, and features pushrod flight controls that provide a precise, well-connected feel in all phases of flight. With a comfortable, functional cabin and a useful load that supports both utility missions and cross-country travel, the XCub is well suited for pilots who value efficiency, capability, and refined handling without unnecessary complexity.
Call Clay at Aerista to learn about this incredible machine.

Experience the ultimate adventure machine with this CubCrafters XCub — the perfect balance of power, performance, and precision craftsmanship. N555ZM has exceptional STOL capabilities, this aircraft takes you places few others can, from backcountry strips to remote lakesides. If you’re looking for unmatched versatility and pure flying freedom, this XCub delivers it all.
Call Clay at Aerista to learn about this incredible machine.

This NX Cub, loaded with extras, is your ticket to STOL flying and backcountry access. Covering the full array of low stall speed and fantastic cruise speed in the cub world, the NX cub opens the door to all sorts of new environments and experiences.
Let N414WP be your new favorite machine, reach out to Clay at Aerista to learn more!

This Carbon Cub FX-3, N200TA, is the ultimate backcountry machine—fully loaded with every factory option and outfitted with top-tier aftermarket upgrades. From the 35-inch Alaskan Bushwheels to the Shock Monster suspension and more, no detail has been overlooked in maximizing performance, comfort, and capability. The panel is equipped with a Garmin G3X, offering state-of-the-art avionics and situational awareness for wherever you choose to fly. Outside, the striking red and metallic paint scheme turns heads on every ramp and blends perfectly with the aircraft’s rugged yet refined personality. Exceptionally maintained and turn-key ready, this FX-3 combines rugged utility with premium refinement—perfect for the pilot who wants the very best without compromise.
Contact Clay at Aerista to learn about this cub and more!

If you didn’t win the Alaska Airmen Association Raffle in 2022… here’s your chance to take home the prize anyways! Aerista is proud to present N751AK, a one of one Carbon Cub FX-3. This airplane started its life as a fully loaded cub, and then was given a gorgeous paint scheme, and raffled off to a loving owner. The Carbon Cub is renowned for its off field capability, incredible useful load, and precision performance. Whether you’re learning to fly or hitting the most remote gravel bars, 1AK is ready for the challenge.
Contact Clay at Aerista to learn more!

N81UE, better known as “Blue” is ready for her new home!
This homebuilt EX-3 boasts a constant speed propeller, a G3X, Acme Suspension, and a whole bunch more. The Carbon Cub is best known for its ridiculous performance. Whether you’re camping under the wing in the middle of the wilderness, or ripping around the pattern, this cub is a performer. She can carry a lot, land short, take off shorter, and cruise fast by cub standards. What’s not to love? She has been fabulously maintained, and will treat her new caretaker right.
Contact Clay at Aerista to learn more!
